ChangeList.Description: Added multiple members to the **auditLogRecordType** enumeration to support audit log record types for various Microsoft 365 workloads including Copilot, Sentinel, Viva Glint, Defender, Purview, and other services.

Added multiple derived types of [auditData](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/resources/security-auditdata?view=graph-rest-beta) to represent audit log records for various Microsoft 365 workloads.
Added multiple members to the **auditLogRecordType** enumeration to support audit log record types for various Microsoft 365 workloads.

Added multiple derived types of [auditData](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/resources/security-auditdata?view=graph-rest-beta) to represent audit log records for various Microsoft 365 workloads.
